since_last: 35% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +2.61% · Gold +1.77% · Nasdaq100 -1.46%. 35% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.56%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +12.45%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +12.45%, ISRG +4.67%, ADBE +4.33%, ADBE +4.33%, AAPL +4.20%. Laggards: TER -11.25%, KLAC -10.09%, CEVA -9.62%, MRVL -8.47%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.09% at $157.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
